name: Quick Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 package (20 oz.) frozen green beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir flour and salt into melted butter in a saucepan.
2. Gradually stir in milk; cook until thickened.
3. Pour the mixture over the green beans.
4. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
5. Bake under broiler until cheese is bubbly.
